---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature proposal.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Impact on Protocol

- [ ] This is an implementation change only (no protocol change)
- [ ] This requires a protocol spec update
- [ ] This requires a version bump

If this affects the protocol, please reference the relevant section of `docs/SPEC.md`.
